title: Nik's LightBlocks
description: A mod that adds colored blocks that emmit a ligth with a level of 14.
body:
This mod adds colored blocks that emmit a ligth with a level of 14.
-------------------------------------------------------------------

### There also is a creative tab integraded and the blocks have crafting recipes.

I initially created this mod in the beginning of 2024 and it is the first mod I ever created.  
I intend to extend this mod in the future.

**Planned features:**

*   Light Slabs
*   Light stairs
*   maybe more…


### Also I'm working on creating new textures for the Blocks and adjusting the properties like lightlevel etc.
